"'''The Way of the Yrashu'''" was an adventure for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]]. It was written by [[Dustin Browder]].

It was based upon the jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Baskarn]] and the [[Yrashu]] who were native to the planet.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
